name: N.B.I. Industrial Finance Company Limited
summary: N.B.I. Industrial Finance Company Limited, a non-banking financial company, invests in shares, securities, and other financial activities. The company was formerly known as The New Bank of India Limited and changed its name to N.B.I. Industrial Finance Company Limited in May 1951. N.B.I. Industrial Finance Company Limited was incorporated in 1936 and is based in Kolkata, India.
